item.title: Testing the Vevor VFD on Our Tool Post Grinder
item.description: The shop puts a new Vevor VFD to the test. How does it perform powering the custom tool post grinder under real workshop conditions?

media:content.media:title: Testing the Vevor VFD on Our Tool Post Grinder
media:content.media:description: The shop puts a new Vevor VFD to the test. How does it perform powering the custom tool post grinder under real workshop conditions?

item.title: Seized Gland Alert! Can We Save This Cylinder?
item.description: A seized gland threatens the cylinder’s future. What machining and repair techniques can rescue it before it’s too late?

media:content.media:title: Seized Gland Alert! Can We Save This Cylinder?
media:content.media:description: A seized gland threatens the cylinder’s future. What machining and repair techniques can rescue it before it’s too late?

item.title: Final Reassembly of the Zayer Quill Feed Attachment
item.description: With internals assembled, the Zayer quill feed attachment gets its final reassembly and a fresh coat of industrial enamel. How does precision engineering bring this rebuild to life?

media:content.media:title: Final Reassembly of the Zayer Quill Feed Attachment
media:content.media:description: With internals assembled, the Zayer quill feed attachment gets its final reassembly and a fresh coat of industrial enamel. How does precision engineering bring this rebuild to life?

item.title: Cutting a Heavy‑Duty Tool Extension from Thick Steel Plate
item.description: Thick steel plate meets machining power. What goes into crafting a heavy‑duty tool extension built to last?

media:content.media:title: Cutting a Heavy‑Duty Tool Extension from Thick Steel Plate
media:content.media:description: Thick steel plate meets machining power. What goes into crafting a heavy‑duty tool extension built to last?

item.title: Manufacturing a Bigger Boring Bar
item.description: When standard tools aren’t enough, you build your own. How is a massive boring bar engineered for precision?

media:content.media:title: Manufacturing a Bigger Boring Bar
media:content.media:description: When standard tools aren’t enough, you build your own. How is a massive boring bar engineered for precision?

item.title: Franna Update | Waterblasting the Boom
item.description: The Franna gets a deep clean with the Rapid Blast SD140. How does waterblasting restore heavy equipment to peak condition?

media:content.media:title: Franna Update | Waterblasting the Boom
media:content.media:description: The Franna gets a deep clean with the Rapid Blast SD140. How does waterblasting restore heavy equipment to peak condition?

item.title: Can This Be the Biggest Shaper? | Klopp 1000H
item.description: The Klopp 1000H shaper towers over the workshop. What makes it one of the biggest machines of its kind?

media:content.media:title: Can This Be the Biggest Shaper? | Klopp 1000H
media:content.media:description: The Klopp 1000H shaper towers over the workshop. What makes it one of the biggest machines of its kind?

item.title: Workshop Problem‑Solving: Oil Leak on Yale 35UX Forklift
item.description: No fancy angles—just real problem‑solving. How is an oil leak tackled step by step through a machinist’s eyes?

media:content.media:title: Workshop Problem‑Solving: Oil Leak on Yale 35UX Forklift
media:content.media:description: No fancy angles—just real problem‑solving. How is an oil leak tackled step by step through a machinist’s eyes?

item.title: Bolt Hole Thread Repair | CAT D9T Bulldozer
item.description: A worn bolt hole threatens a CAT D9T. How does precision thread repair bring this bulldozer back to strength?

media:content.media:title: Bolt Hole Thread Repair | CAT D9T Bulldozer
media:content.media:description: A worn bolt hole threatens a CAT D9T. How does precision thread repair bring this bulldozer back to strength?

item.title: Turning 4140 Steel into a Massive Custom Nut
item.description: From a solid chunk of 4140 steel to a precision‑machined giant nut—what steps make this transformation possible?

media:content.media:title: Turning 4140 Steel into a Massive Custom Nut
media:content.media:description: From a solid chunk of 4140 steel to a precision‑machined giant nut—what steps make this transformation possible?

item.title: Franna crane teardown: removing and inspecting the diffs
item.description: The Franna crane project moves forward as the team removes and carefully inspects the differentials. Every component gets a thorough look before any decisions are made. What do you think they'll find?

media:content.media:title: Franna crane teardown: removing and inspecting the diffs
media:content.media:description: The Franna crane project moves forward as the team removes and carefully inspects the differentials. Every component gets a thorough look before any decisions are made. What do you think they'll find?

item.title: Cracked housing repaired and made stronger than before
item.description: A cracked Bobcat housing gets welded up and reinforced to come back tougher than it was originally. Solid repair work that focuses on doing the job right the first time. Have you ever reinforced a repair for extra durability?

media:content.media:title: Cracked housing repaired and made stronger than before
media:content.media:description: A cracked Bobcat housing gets welded up and reinforced to come back tougher than it was originally. Solid repair work that focuses on doing the job right the first time. Have you ever reinforced a repair for extra durability?

item.title: Building a heavy-duty tool post grinder in-house
item.description: The team welds and line-bores their own heavy-duty tool post grinder from scratch — a shop-made build that blends precision engineering with practical workshop ingenuity. Could you build your own tooling from the ground up?

media:content.media:title: Building a heavy-duty tool post grinder in-house
media:content.media:description: The team welds and line-bores their own heavy-duty tool post grinder from scratch — a shop-made build that blends precision engineering with practical workshop ingenuity. Could you build your own tooling from the ground up?

item.title: The Megabore lathe takes its first steps
item.description: The carriage, tailstock, and systems on the Megabore lathe get their very first movement in these early test runs. A big machine coming to life for the first time — what do you think the first real job will be?

media:content.media:title: The Megabore lathe takes its first steps
media:content.media:description: The carriage, tailstock, and systems on the Megabore lathe get their very first movement in these early test runs. A big machine coming to life for the first time — what do you think the first real job will be?

item.title: Reassembling a Yale forklift's brake system
item.description: Retaining springs don't give up without a fight. Watch Kurtis work through the challenges of reassembling the brake system on the workshop's Yale forklift. Have you ever wrestled with a stubborn spring?

media:content.media:title: Reassembling a Yale forklift's brake system
media:content.media:description: Retaining springs don't give up without a fight. Watch Kurtis work through the challenges of reassembling the brake system on the workshop's Yale forklift. Have you ever wrestled with a stubborn spring?

item.title: Is the Klopp 1,000H the world's biggest shaper?
item.description: The Klopp 1,000H shaper is an imposing piece of machinery — and the team is about to find out just how capable it really is. Have you ever seen a shaper on this scale before?

media:content.media:title: Is the Klopp 1,000H the world's biggest shaper?
media:content.media:description: The Klopp 1,000H shaper is an imposing piece of machinery — and the team is about to find out just how capable it really is. Have you ever seen a shaper on this scale before?
